action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AUC 0.7485 with val AUC 0.7491. Model overfits around epoch 20. Small dataset (2180 sequences) limits individual model performance. Analysis: Ensemble of diverse models is the most reliable way to boost performance. Different architectures (SAKT + GRU) and hyperparameters will provide diversity. Training 4 models for 25 epochs each should take ~3-4 minutes. Decision: Implement ensemble training with 3 SAKT variants + 1 GRU model, update predict.py for ensemble prediction, submit eval.
